description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a hinged clamshell design. The exterior lid features a prominent black gear symbol centered on a matte gray surface, giving it a distinctive and industrial look. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, including a function row and a large touchpad below the spacebar. The screen is open and displays a broken or glitched graphic, suggesting either a damaged display or a stylized digital effect. The laptop's sides are thin, with no visible ports or connectors, emphasizing its minimalist design. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metallic elements for structural support.
description: A slim, gray laptop with a black gear symbol on the lid, a full QWERTY keyboard, and a screen displaying a broken or glitched graphic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a broken graphic, full keyboard, and large touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile and the open screen; no visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gray lid with a centered black gear symbol; hinge is visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and open screen; no visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A black gear symbol is centered on the exterior lid; it is not a recognizable commercial brand logo.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be on, displaying a broken or glitched graphic.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; all keys are visible and labeled in English.
